description: The situation explodes into violence as the S.H.I.E.L.D. team is attacked by robotic soldiers. During the chaotic battle, Ruby, under orders from Hale, gravely injures Yo-Yo by severing her arms — fulfilling the dark prophecy from the future. Piper switches sides to help the agents escape with the beacon.
location: St. Louis (site of the Kree beacon)

transcript.line: What? No, I-It's do not engage. It's capture, not kill.
They're not human! Go for the face!
You were trained better than this.
No, Hale is an ally. Talbot's in a coma. She's general in command. I thought... No, she's U.S. military. Look. I just wanted to help.
And you got played. We have to take this thing and get out of here before we're all killed. Are you gonna help? Piper, pick a side, but we're going.
Hold on. We're gonna get you to the hospital.
Okay. Fancy stuff. Here we go.
You don't know what any of this is, do you?
I know computers. These are computers, right?
Hello. I'm Noah. I believe saving you from imprisonment was wrong.
Oh. All right, cool. Well, you seem fun.
Daisy. Daisy, come in. We need to land, somewhere close, and fast.
May, yeah, I've got a surprise for you. Rick Stoner put in a...
